description: Copy this file into an agent runtime and replace tool names with the tools that runtime exposes.

web_search.purpose: Keyword discovery, SERP analysis, trend validation, competitor research.

web_fetch.purpose: Read competitor pages, reference material, and published article URLs.

repo_read.purpose: Inspect remote repositories when a target content site is not already local.

shell.purpose: Run SEO Forge CLI commands, checks, tests, builds, and git commands.

pull_request.purpose: Publish completed content changes through a pull request.

deployment_checks.purpose: Monitor GitHub Actions, Vercel, or another deployment surface after publishing.

fallbacks.missing_web_search: Stop and ask the operator to provide a web search connector; SEO Forge should not fabricate SERP or trend data.
fallbacks.missing_web_fetch: Use browser automation or a fetch CLI if available; otherwise ask for fetched source text.
fallbacks.missing_repo_read: Clone the target repository locally with git or ask the operator to provide the local path.
fallbacks.missing_pull_request: Leave a committed local branch and print exact push/PR instructions.
